description: CompositionBlue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a square neck, yoke with dark blue pin tucks and buttoned chest placket, dark blue tape detailing along the empire waist, three-quarter sleeves with dark blue tape detailing along the cuffs and a vented hem FitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm ironInspired by traditional Indian prints and crafted with a classic cut, this kurta from vishudh makes a fabulous addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The pin tucks on the yoke add zing to the garment. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
